final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire clr,
    input wire up_down,
    output reg [3:0] count
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (clr) begin
        count <= 4'b0000;
    end else if (up_down) begin
        count <= count + 1;
    end else begin
        count <= count - 1;
    end
end

endmodule
